interface.longDescription:
Turn an idea or an uploaded file into a clean outline right inside ChatGPT.
Ask Outliner to structure a pitch deck, map a product launch, or shape an essay; it instantly builds a logical hierarchy you can promote, trim, or delete — letting you think while it formats.

How to Use Outliner in ChatGPT

1. Connect: Connect the Outliner app to ChatGPT.
2. Trigger: Activate the app using one of these methods:
Type Commands: Simply type “@” then choose the Outliner app, or type “Outliner” (followed by a space) in the chat box.
Action List: Select it directly from the Action List (Requires the Sider extension).
3. Create: You are ready to go! Try asking specifically:
· “Outline my climate-change research paper.”
· “Break this product concept into a step-by-step workflow.”
· “Summarize this file, then build a project-plan outline.”

When you’re ready, copy the outline and keep refining it with your team.
